name: coagent
description: Gated code review, cross-agent dispatch, background task management, and session transfer for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Gated code review, cross-agent dispatch, and session transfer
interface.longDescription: Coagent provides a local multi-agent runtime layer between Codex and external expert agents. It owns tool registration, task/operation/attempt state, permission gating, context projection, ACP session management, backend selection, audit, and recovery.
defaultPrompt: Run an adversarial review of this feature branch
